nil.description: Type with single value nil representing absence of value, distinct from any other type

boolean.description: Type with values true and false; nil and false are falsy, everything else is truthy

number.description: Double-precision floating-point number, the default numeric type in Lua 5.3+

string.description: Immutable sequence of bytes, can hold any data including embedded zeros

table.description: The only compound data type in Lua, implementing arrays, dictionaries, objects, and modules

function.description: First-class value representing a callable function or closure

userdata.description: Opaque data type for C data stored in Lua variables, managed by the host application

thread.description: Independent thread of execution used for cooperative multitasking via coroutines

integer.description: 64-bit signed integer subtype used for whole number arithmetic (Lua 5.3+)
